overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, ascends illuminated stairs, and walks through covered walkways surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and cyan-magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city street with holographic advertisements

events.description: begins crossing the street toward the illuminated staircase
starts ascending stairs with cyan neon edge lighting, moving from open street to semi-enclosed space

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, crossing the street, and ascending the illuminated staircase

entered.detail: large pink and cyan digital billboard displaying advertisements on building facade
tall glass building with prominent cyan neon edge lighting
wide staircase with bright cyan neon lighting along the edges
wet asphalt road surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings with cyan neon trim and massive pink holographic billboards. The camera walks along the sidewalk, crosses the asphalt street, and begins ascending a wide staircase illuminated with bright cyan neon edges, transitioning from the open street toward an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with hotel entrance

events.description: enters fully covered walkway with reflective flooring and overhead ceiling
passes the brightly lit 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA' neon sign, increasing local illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, passing by the hotel entrance and vending areas

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: overhead covered roof structure blocking the sky
highly polished dark marble floor reflecting neon lights and surroundings
large illuminated sign reading 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA' in cyan neon
glass-walled elevator shaft with internal lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway with a highly reflective marble floor that mirrors the cyan neon lighting. The space features a prominent 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA' neon sign on the right wall, a glass elevator structure on the left, and overhead covering that blocks the night sky. The environment shifts from the open street to this sheltered, neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza between towering skyscrapers with holographic advertising

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with towering skyscrapers visible
camera pans upward to reveal the full height of surrounding skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the towering buildings and advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical red billboard with 'ZEUS BISHO' text and imagery
tall multi-level glass and steel building with exposed structural beams
tall tower displaying multiple layers of holographic advertisements
external escalator system connecting building levels

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza surrounded by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. The camera pans upward to reveal the immense scale of the glass and steel buildings adorned with massive holographic advertisements, including a prominent red 'ZEUS BISHO' billboard. The area transitions from enclosed to wide open, with the night sky visible above the neon-lit towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with pedestrian crosswalk and sidewalk

events.description: crossing the street at a yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians
finishes crossing and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk among a group of pedestrians, then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crosswalk with yellow striped markings
concrete sidewalk with yellow-black bollards separating it from the street
large cylindrical planter containing palm trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing a city street at a yellow-striped crosswalk, moving among a moderate crowd of pedestrians. After crossing, the camera continues along a concrete sidewalk lined with bollards and palm tree planters, with building facades displaying advertisements on the right. Vehicles pass by on the street as the walk continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an open street into a sheltered corridor before emerging into a vast urban plaza. It begins on a sidewalk surrounded by towering glass buildings and pink holographic billboards, moving across the asphalt to ascend a wide staircase illuminated with bright cyan neon edges. As the camera climbs, the environment shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway with reflective marble floors, passing a glass elevator and a glowing Wild Blue Hotel & Spa sign. The scene then opens from this enclosed corridor into a massive plaza, where the camera pans upward to reveal the immense scale of skyscrapers and a prominent red Zeus Bisho billboard against the night sky. Finally, the movement leads back down to street level, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk among a crowd of pedestrians and continuing along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm tree planters and passing vehicles.
